description_long: This object is a modern touchscreen mobile phone with a sleek, rectangular form factor and rounded corners. The front face is dominated by a large, edge-to-edge display with minimal bezels, showing a blue-themed wallpaper with mountain silhouettes and a digital clock widget. The device features a small circular front-facing camera cutout at the top center of the screen. Along the sides, there are several physical buttons, likely for power and volume control, and a visible charging port and speaker grille on the bottom edge. The phone's exterior appears to be constructed from a combination of glass and metal, giving it a premium, glossy finish. No external case or cover is present, and there are no visible brand logos on the surfaces shown.
description: A sleek, modern mobile phone with a large edge-to-edge display, minimal bezels, and a blue mountain-themed wallpaper. The device features side buttons, a bottom charging port, and a front-facing camera cutout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large display with blue wallpaper, app icons, and the bottom charging port and speaker grille.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile, metallic frame, and physical buttons along the right edge.
description_view_2: Rear-angled view of the screen, showing the front camera cutout at the top center and the curved edges.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the uninterrupted edge and the continuation of the display's sleek design.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a blue wallpaper with mountain silhouettes, a digital clock widget reading 'SUNDAY', and a row of app icons along the bottom edge. No notifications or additional widgets are visible.
attribute_camera_placement: A single front-facing camera is visible as a small circular cutout centered at the top of the display. No rear cameras are visible in the provided views.
attribute_button_layout: There are at least two physical buttons visible on the right edge, likely a power button and a volume rocker. No buttons are present on the front or left edge.
